articles.title: Lily Allen's Picture in a Famous Gallery
articles.summary: A painting of singer Lily Allen is now on display at the National Portrait Gallery in London. The picture was made by Spanish artist Nieves Gonzalez and shows Lily sitting on a stool wearing a polka dot jacket and boots, with a tattoo on her leg. Lily is happy that people can see this special painting. She says the artist captured the feeling of her album, which is called West End Girl. The album talks about her break-up and has songs that mix truth and fantasy. The gallery director says Lily is an important voice for her generation, and the gallery has pictures of many famous people like Shakespeare and Adele. The painting will be shown for one year.

articles.title: A Galaxy Crash Changes a Neighbor
articles.summary: Astronomers have discovered that the Small Magellanic Cloud, a nearby galaxy we can see from Earth, was hit by another galaxy called the Large Magellanic Cloud. This crash happened a long time ago and changed how the stars move inside the Small Magellanic Cloud. Normally, stars in galaxies orbit in neat circles, but in this galaxy, they move in a messy way because of the collision. Scientists used telescopes like Hubble and Gaia to study this. The crash also affected the gas in the galaxy, making it lose its spin. This finding is important because it shows that the Small Magellanic Cloud is not a typical galaxy and might not be a good example for learning about how galaxies form and evolve. The research helps us understand how galaxies can change when they collide.

articles.title: Turning Air Pollution into Useful Fuel with Tiny Helpers
articles.summary: Scientists have found a new way to help turn carbon dioxide, a gas that can harm our planet, into a useful fuel called methanol. They use something called a catalyst, which is like a helper that makes chemical reactions easier and faster. This new catalyst is special because it uses tiny pieces of metal called indium atoms, each working alone instead of in big groups. This makes the process more efficient and cheaper. Methanol is important because it can be used to make fuels and plastics, helping us move away from fossil fuels. By using renewable energy, this method could help fight climate change by recycling CO2 instead of letting it pollute the air. The scientists at ETH Zurich made this breakthrough to create cleaner chemicals and reduce waste.

articles.title: Fran Jones Wins Big Tennis Match Against Her Hero
articles.summary: Fran Jones from Britain won a special tennis match against her childhood hero, Venus Williams, at the Miami Open. Jones is 25 years old and this was her first big win at a top tournament. Venus Williams is a famous champion who has won many Grand Slam titles, but she is 45 years old and has lost nine matches in a row. In another surprise, Iga Swiatek, who is a top player and Wimbledon champion, lost her match to Magda Linette. Swiatek said she played badly and needs to work hard to improve. Jones was born with a condition that affects her hands and feet, but she was inspired by Venus and Serena Williams to play tennis even when doctors said she couldn't. After winning, Jones hugged Venus and told her she still has a poster of the Williams sisters on her wall.

articles.title: Author's Secret First Book
articles.summary: Raynor Winn wrote a book called The Salt Path in 2018 and said it was her first book ever. But she actually wrote another book in 2012 under a different name. This earlier book was sold as part of a prize to win her house. She won awards for The Salt Path as a debut writer, which means it was supposed to be her first book. A new podcast found out about the secret book. Raynor and her husband owned a publishing company that made the first book. She said trying to sell the book with the house was a mistake. This story shows it is important to tell the truth about your work.

articles.title: BTS Returns with a Big Concert and New Album
articles.summary: BTS is a famous K-pop band from South Korea. They are coming back after a break of four years. During this break, all seven members did their military service. Now, they are starting a big world tour with a free concert in Seoul. Many fans will watch it live or on Netflix. Their new album is called Arirang, and fans are very excited. The band used to make fun disco songs, but now they are making more energetic music like they did when they started. This comeback is important because it shows if K-pop is still popular around the world. The band's company, HYBE, is hoping the album will help them make more money.
